title: Rithvik Eyes Top 50 After Valence Alpes Title Win
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rithvik is making strides, winning an international title and aiming for the world's top 50.
summary: Young Indian shuttler Rithvik attributes his recent Valence Alpes International title win to an improved net game and aims to break into the world's top 50.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian star Kidambi Srikanth showed strong form by reaching the US Open final, a significant achievement for Indian badminton.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title, finishing as runner-up.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship Highlighted at US Open Final
indian_angle: This article highlights Kidambi Srikanth's exceptional sportsmanship during his US Open final run, reflecting positively on Indian athletes.
summary: A feature on Kidambi Srikanth's sportsmanship during the US Open final, where he notably overturned a point given to him.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a major upset by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: PV Sindhu's Early Career Steps in Macau Recalled
indian_angle: This feature explores the early career of Indian badminton icon PV Sindhu, tracing her initial steps towards global stardom.
summary: A look back at PV Sindhu's nascent career, recalling her first steps on the road to stardom in Macau.

title: Indian Thomas Cup Squad Reunites for Asian Games
indian_angle: The core of India's victorious Thomas Cup squad, including Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, is reassembling for the upcoming Asian Games.
summary: India's Thomas Cup squad is reassembling for the Asian Games, with the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand.
